revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Amefutotamanomikoto-jinja]][[ja:天太玉命神社]] {{Expand Japanese|天太玉命神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Amefutotama-no-Mikoto Shrine | native_name = 天太玉命神社 | image = Amefutotamanomikoto-jinja, haiden.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Amefutotama-no-Mikoto Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.507375|135.77327194444445}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Futodama|lt=Futodama|en|Futodama|it|Futodama|ja|フトダマ|ru|Футодама|simple|Futodama|zh|布刀玉命|qid=Q11059539|1=Futodama}} }} {{nihongo|'''Amefutotama-no-Mikoto Shrine'''|天太玉命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Myojin Taisha|lt=Myōjin Taisha|en|Myojin Taisha|fr|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|simple|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} * {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} ** Series ordinal: 171 ** P155: {{ill|Harutano Shrine|lt=Harutano Shrine|qid=Q135039010|1=Harutano Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q54153271|ltq=Q54153271|qid=Q54153271|1=Kushitamanomikoto Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Kashihara, Nara|lt=Kashihara|ar|كاشيهارا (نارا)|azb|کاشیهارا، نارا|ca|Kashihara|ceb|Kashihara-shi (lungsod sa Hapon)|ce|Касихара|cs|Kašihara|de|Kashihara|devoyage|Kashihara|en|Kashihara, Nara|envoyage|Kashihara|eo|Kaŝihara|es|Kashihara (Nara)|eu|Kashihara (Nara)|fa|کاشیهارا، نارا|fi|Kashihara|fr|Kashihara|gl|Kashihara|hy|Կաշիհարա|id|Kashihara, Nara|it|Kashihara|ja|橿原市|javoyage|橿原市|ko|가시하라시|ms|Kashihara, Nara|mzn|کاشیهارا، نارا|nl|Kashihara|no|Kashihara|pl|Kashihara|pt|Kashihara|ro|Kashihara|ru|Касихара|sh|Kashihara|simple|Kashihara, Nara|sr|Кашихара|sv|Kashihara|tg|Кашиҳара|th|คาชิฮาระ|tl|Kashihara, Nara|tr|Kashihara|tt|Касихара|uk|Касіхара|ur|کاشی ہارا، نارا|vi|Kashihara, Nara|war|Kashihara, Nara|zh_classical|橿原市|zh_min_nan|Kasihara-chhī|zh_yue|橿原|zh|橿原市|qid=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} * {{ill|Q907495|ltq=Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} * {{ill|Takaichi District, Nara|lt=Takaichi district|ar|تاكايشي|ca|Districte de Takaichi|ceb|Takaichi-gun|en|Takaichi District, Nara|es|Distrito de Takaichi|fa|منطقه تاکاایچی، نارا|fr|District de Takaichi|id|Distrik Takaichi, Nara|it|Distretto di Takaichi|ja|高市郡|ko|다카이치군|nl|Takaichi (district)|pl|Powiat Takaichi|ru|Такаити|zh|高市郡|qid=Q1117901|1=Takaichi District, Nara}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.507375|135.77327194444445}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Amefutotamanomikoto-jinja, haiden.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Futodama|lt=Futodama|en|Futodama|it|Futodama|ja|フトダマ|ru|Футодама|simple|Futodama|zh|布刀玉命|qid=Q11059539|1=Futodama}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041123011740/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22817 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180830 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|ja|村社|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * Dineʼé Bikéyah|ny|Japan|oc|Japon|olo|Japounii|om|Jaappaan|or|ଜାପାନ|os|Япон|pag|Hapon|pam|Hapon|pap|Hapon|pa|ਜਪਾਨ|pcd|Japon|pcm|Japan|pdc|Japan|pfl|Japan|pl|Japonia|plnews|Kategoria:Japonia|plquote|Japonia|plvoyage|Japonia|pms|Giapon|pnb|جاپان|pnt|Ιαπωνία|ps|جاپان|pt|Japão|ptnews|Categoria:Japão|ptquote|Japão|ptvoyage|Japão|pwn|Dripun|qu|Hapun|rm|Giapun|rmy|Japan|rn|Yapon|roa_rup|Japonia|roa_tara|Giappone|ro|Japonia|ronews|Categorie:Japonia|rovoyage|Japonia|rue|Японія|ru|Япония|runews|Категория:Япония|ruvoyage|Япония|rw|Ubuyapani|sah|Дьоппуон|sat|ᱡᱟᱯᱟᱱ|sa|जपान्|scn|Giappuni|sco|Japan|sc|Giapone|sd|جاپان|se|Jáhpan|sg|Zapöo|shn|မိူင်းၵျႃႇပၢၼ်ႇ|sh|Japan|simple|Japan|si|ජපානය|skr|جاپان|sk|Japonsko|sl|Japonska|smn|Jaapaan|sm|Iapani|sn|Japani|so|Jabaan|sq|Japonia|sqnews|Kategoria:Japoni|srn|Japan|sr|Јапан|srnews|Категорија:Јапан|srquote|Јапан|ss|IJapani|stq|Japan|st|Japane|su|Jepang|sv|Japan|svnews|Kategori:Japan|svvoyage|Japan|sw|Japani|syl|ꠎꠣꠙꠣꠘ|szl|Japůńijo|szy|Zipun|ta|யப்பான்|tanews|பகுப்பு:ஜப்பான்|tay|Gipun|tcy|ಜಪಾನ್|tdd|ᥛᥫᥒᥰ ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あめのふとたまのみことじんじゃ * あめふとたまのみことじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3150005004846 == Commons category (P373) == * Amefutotamanomikoto-jinja == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|qid=Q135018062|1=Engishiki seat}} ** P1114: {'amount': '+4', 'unit': '1'} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県橿原市忌部町153（字一ノ道）', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Amefutotamanomikoto-jinja}} [[JA:天太玉命神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11442508}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine |Image = [[File:Amefutotamanomikoto-jinja, haiden.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara City|Q496319|qid=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Inbe-chō 153 (Aza Ichinomichi) |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|lt=Futodama|Q11059539|qid=Q11059539|lt=Amefutotamanomikoto|1=Futodama}}
{{ill|lt=Oomiyanome|Q24865597|qid=Q24865597|lt=Oomiyanome-no-mikoto|1=Ōmiya-no-Me}}
{{ill|lt=Amaiwatowake no Kami|Q10940542|qid=Q10940542|lt=Toyoiwamado-no-mikoto|1=Ama-no-Iwato-wake no Kami}}
{{ill|lt=Amaiwatowake no Kami|Q10940542|qid=Q10940542|lt=Kushiiwamado-no-mikoto|1=Ama-no-Iwato-wake no Kami}} |Sacred object = |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|lt=Myōjin Taisha|1=Myōjin Taisha}} 4 deities)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = {{ill|lt=October 9|Q2923|qid=Q2923|1=October 9}} |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Amefutotamanomikoto
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Amefutotamanomikoto-jinja, entrance-2.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Shrine entrance}}]] [[File:Amefutotamanomikoto-jinja honden.jpg|thumb|220px|right|{{center|Main hall}}]] '''Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine''' (あめふとたまのみことじんじゃ[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%A2%E8%A1%8C/%E5%A4%A9%E5%A4%AA%E7%8E%89%E5%91%BD%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine] (Nara Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines). / あめのふとたまのみことじんじゃ{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Heibonsha)|1981}}) is a Shinto shrine located in Inbe-chō, Kashihara City, Nara Prefecture. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=Myōjin Taisha|Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and under the {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=former shrine ranking|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} it was classified as a {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. It is known as the clan shrine of the ancient {{ill|lt=Inbe clan|Q8189229|qid=Q8189229|1=Inbe clan}} (Imbe clan). === Enshrined deities === The shrine enshrines the following four deitiesOn-site explanatory plaque.: :* '''{{ill|lt=Futodama|Q11059539|qid=Q11059539|lt=Amefutotamanomikoto|1=Futodama}}''' (also read Amenofutotamanomikoto) :* '''{{ill|lt=Oomiyanome|Q24865597|qid=Q24865597|lt=Oomiyanome-no-mikoto|1=Ōmiya-no-Me}}''' :* '''{{ill|lt=Amaiwatowake no Kami|Q10940542|qid=Q10940542|lt=Toyoiwamado-no-mikoto|1=Ama-no-Iwato-wake no Kami}}''' :* '''{{ill|lt=Amaiwatowake no Kami|Q10940542|qid=Q10940542|lt=Kushiiwamado-no-mikoto|1=Ama-no-Iwato-wake no Kami}}''' In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}}'' {{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} (compiled in {{ill|lt=Enchō era|Q1327274|qid=Q1327274|1=Enchō}} 5 [{{ill|lt=927|Q30470|qid=Q30470|1=927}}]), the shrine is listed as having four enshrined deities{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Heibonsha)|1981}}. It appears there as “Tamadamamiko Shrine, four deities,” with one deity identified as Tamadama-no-mikoto, while the identities of the remaining three are unclear{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Kami-gami)|2000}}. The ''Engishiki'' also records four deities in the section on the Myōjin Festival. === About the enshrined deities === The principal deity, {{ill|lt=Futodama|Q11059539|qid=Q11059539|lt=Tamadama-no-mikoto (Futodama)|1=Futodama}}, is known as the ancestral deity of the ancient {{ill|lt=Inbe clan|Q8189229|qid=Q8189229|1=Inbe clan}}. According to the ''{{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|qid=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}'', ''{{ill|lt=Nihon Shoki|Q813935|qid=Q813935|1=Nihon Shoki}}'', and ''{{ill|lt=Kogo Shūi|Q531555|qid=Q531555|1=Kogo Shūi}}'', this deity performed sacred rites together with {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-mikoto|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} (ancestral deity of the {{ill|lt=Nakatomi clan|Q1198447|qid=Q1198447|1=Nakatomi clan}}) during the concealment of {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}} in the {{ill|lt=Amano-Iwato|Q3231835|qid=Q3231835|1=Amano-Iwato}} cave, and later accompanied {{ill|lt=Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Q1056017|qid=Q1056017|1=Ninigi-no-Mikoto}} during the {{ill|lt=Tenson kōrin|Q1084733|qid=Q1084733|1=Tenson kōrin}} as one of the five accompanying deities{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Kami-gami)|2000}}. The Inbe clan, descended from Futodama-no-mikoto, shared responsibility for court rituals with the Nakatomi clan{{Sfn|Inbe clan (ancient clan)|2010}}{{Sfn|Imbe (Ancient Clan Encyclopedia)|2015}}. The shrine listed in the ''Engishiki'' as “Tamadama-no-mikoto Shrine” is therefore thought to have been the clan shrine of the Inbe{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Kami-gami)|2000}}. The surrounding area, bearing the place name “Inbe,” is considered the clan’s original homeland{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Kami-gami)|2000}}. However, the identification of this shrine with the “Tamadama-no-mikoto Shrine” of the ''Engishiki'' dates only from {{ill|lt=Genroku era|Q1325001|qid=Q1325001|1=Genroku}} 10 ({{ill|lt=1697|Q7702|qid=Q7702|1=1697}}), when it was proposed by Matsushita Kenrin, and its earlier history remains unclear{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Kami-gami)|2000}}. As noted above, the ''Engishiki'' lists four enshrined deities but gives no details. The ''Gogun Jinjaki'' identifies them as Amefutotama-no-kami, Oomiyanome-no-kami, Tamadama-no-mikoto (possibly {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Tomi-no-mikoto|Q24899653|qid=Q24899653|1=Amatomi no Mikoto}}), and Amehi-no-rime-no-mikoto, while Matsushita Kenrin’s ''Tamadama-no-mikoto Shaki'' identifies them as Amefutotamanomikoto, Oomiyanome-no-mikoto, Toyoiwamado-no-mikoto, and Kushiiwamado-no-mikoto; the latter identification is followed today{{Sfn|Tamadama-no-mikoto Shrine, four deities (Shikinaisha)|1982}}. The three deities Oomiyanome-no-mikoto, Toyoiwamado-no-mikoto, and Kushiiwamado-no-mikoto are positioned in the ''Kogo Shūi'' and ''{{ill|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|Q2716751|qid=Q2716751|1=Kujiki}}'' as offspring deities of Futodama-no-mikoto{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Kami-gami)|2000}}. As described below, a {{ill|lt=Daijōkan decree|Q11665185|qid=Q11665185|1=Ruijū Sandai Kyaku}} dated {{ill|lt=Jōgan era|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|1=Jōgan}} 10 ({{ill|lt=868|Q25061|qid=Q25061|1=868}}) in the ''{{ill|lt=Ruijū Sandai Kyaku|Q11665185|qid=Q11665185|1=Ruijū Sandai Kyaku}}'' places the shrine of “Amefutotama-no-kami,” together with the shrines of Usutaki-no-kami and Kayamabime-no-kami, among the descendants of {{ill|lt=Asukaniimasu Shrine|Q11665959|qid=Q11665959|1=Asuka-ni-Imasu Shrine}}. === History === ==== Overview === The date of founding is unknown. As noted above, the area is thought to have been the homeland of the Inbe clan, and the shrine is presumed to have been established as their clan shrine. In official histories, an entry records that in {{ill|lt=Ten’an era|Q1075611|qid=Q1075611|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}}) the divine rank of “Tamadama-no-mikoto” was promoted to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Heibonsha)|1981}}. A {{ill|lt=Daijōkan decree|Q11665185|qid=Q11665185|1=Ruijū Sandai Kyaku}} dated June 28, {{ill|lt=Jōgan era|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|1=Jōgan}} 10 ({{ill|lt=868|Q25061|qid=Q25061|1=868}}) in the ''Ruijū Sandai Kyaku'' lists the shrine of “Amefutotama-no-kami” as one of the four descendant shrines of Asuka-no-kami{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Heibonsha)|1981}}. In the ''Engishiki'' Jinmyōchō (compiled in {{ill|lt=Enchō era|Q1327274|qid=Q1327274|1=Enchō}} 5 [{{ill|lt=927|Q30470|qid=Q30470|1=927}}]), it is listed in {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}}{{ill|lt=Takaichi District|Q1117901|qid=Q1117901|1=Takaichi District, Nara}} as “Tamadama-no-mikoto Shrine, four deities, Myōjin Taisha,” and is recorded as receiving offerings at the imperial {{ill|lt=Tsukinami Festival|Q11516161|qid=Q11516161|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri}} and {{ill|lt=Niiname Festival|Q11501518|qid=Q11501518|1=Niiname-no-Matsuri}}{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Heibonsha)|1981}}. It also appears in the ''Engishiki'' section on extraordinary festivals. However, as the Inbe clan declined during the {{ill|lt=Nara period|Q189178|qid=Q189178|1=Nara period}} and {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}}, in contrast to the rise of the Nakatomi clan, the shrine is thought to have similarly fallen into decline{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Kami-gami)|2000}}. During the {{ill|lt=Muromachi period|Q334845|qid=Q334845|1=Muromachi period}}, a document dated {{ill|lt=Kakitsu era|Q1193238|qid=Q1193238|1=Kakitsu}} 1 ({{ill|lt=1441|Q6402|qid=Q6402|1=1441}}), the “Kōfuku-ji Kanmuchi Chōsho,” records a shrine of “Tamadama-no-kami” in Inbe, Takaichi District, noting that it was affiliated with {{ill|lt=Kōfuku-ji|Q1070863|qid=Q1070863|1=Kōfuku-ji}} and that its temple-shrine complex ({{ill|lt=jingū-ji|Q1074971|qid=Q1074971|1=Jingū-ji}}) was Renkō-ji{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Heibonsha)|1981}}{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Kami-gami)|2000}}. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as “Kasuga Shrine,” but in {{ill|lt=Genroku era|Q1325001|qid=Q1325001|1=Genroku}} 10 ({{ill|lt=1697|Q7702|qid=Q7702|1=1697}}) it was identified by {{ill|lt=Matsushita Kenrin|Q92923373|qid=Q92923373|1=Matsushita Kenrin}} as the “Tamadama-no-mikoto Shrine” of the ''Engishiki''{{Sfn|Amefutotamanomikoto Shrine (Heibonsha)|1981}}. After the {{ill|lt=Meiji Restoration|Q8707|qid=Q8707|1=Meiji Restoration}}, in {{ill|lt=Meiji era|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 41 ({{ill|lt=1908|Q2056|qid=Q2056|1=1908}}) October, it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} under the {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}{{Sfn|Tamadama-no-mikoto Shrine, four deities (Shikinaisha)|1982}}. === Divine ranks === * {{ill|lt=Ten’an era|Q1075611|qid=Q1075611|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}}) {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|qid=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') — recorded as “Tamadama-no-mikoto.” === Subsidiary shrines === * Tamayorihime-no-mikoto Shrine — Deity: {{ill|lt=Tamayorihime|Q56344982|qid=Q56344982|lt=Tamayorihime-no-mikoto|1=Tamayori-hime}}. Located to the right of the main hall. * Kasuga Shrine — Deity: {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-mikoto|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane}}. Located to the left of the main hall. === On-site information === '''Address''' * Inbe-chō Aza Ichinomichi 153, Kashihara City, Nara Prefecture '''Access''' * Railway: {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|qid=Q502125|1=West Japan Railway Company}} (JR West), {{ill|lt=Sakurai Line|Q865801|qid=Q865801|1=Sakurai Line}} (Manyō Mahoroba Line), {{ill|lt=Kanahashi Station|Q5362037|qid=Q5362037|1=Kanahashi Station}} — about a 13-minute walk === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{reflist}} === References === * On-site explanatory plaque * Dictionaries ** {{Cite
